title: Graphify context enrichment core module
description: Build a core module that reads Graphify output (graph.json, concepts, file metadata) and enriches Waystation briefs with codebase context. This is best-effort — missing or stale Graphify data degrades gracefully. Graphify data informs briefs but never decides task status, claims, or completion.
acceptance: src/core/graph.ts exports loadGraphData(root, graphPath?): CommandResult<GraphData>. Reads graphify-out/graph.json (or configurable path) and validates against a minimal zod schema.
GraphData includes: nodes (functions, classes, files), edges (calls, imports, dependencies), concepts (topics, summaries), and file metadata (size, language, last modified).

Brief enrichment: brief.ts calls loadGraphData() and adds three optional fields to the Brief interface: relatedFiles (files connected to task.path_hints via graph edges), concepts (topics matching the task scope/description), impactHints (warnings about files that depend on or are depended-by the touched paths).
Graph data missing or invalid → brief still succeeds, fields are empty arrays. No crash, no degraded status.
Path to graph output is configurable via .waystation/config.json (graph_path field, defaults to graphify-out/).
bun:test: loads mock graph data, verifies brief enrichment when graph is present; verifies brief is unaffected when graph is missing.
typecheck, biome check, and waystation validate all clean.
notes: Graphify output format: graph.json is a JSON object with nodes (id, type, file, name, summary fields), edges (source, target, type, label), and optional concepts array. The enrichment logic: 1) For each path_hint in the task, find graph nodes whose file matches (fuzzy match — path_hint may be a directory or glob). 2) Follow edges from those nodes to find related files. 3) Surface concepts whose keywords appear in the task title or description. 4) Impact hints: highlight nodes that depend on the touched files (inbound edges) and nodes the touched files depend on (outbound edges). Keep it focused: max ~15 related files, ~5 concepts, ~5 impact hints to avoid context bloat. Config path: use paths.ts/config or read the config.json directly.
